## What changed and why

<!-- The diff shows what changed line-by-line — use this space for the why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no functional change
- [ ] `test` — adding or fixing tests
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, dependencies, CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes (if the change touches a user-facing flow)
- [ ] I tested this by hand in the browser, not just via green checks
- [ ] Docs updated if this changes behavior described in `README.md` or `docs/`

## Screenshots

<!-- If this is a UI change, before/after screenshots make review much faster. -->
